name: Blinding Flash
description: You create a sudden burst of brilliant light. All creatures within 10 feet must make a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of their next turn.
effect: Creatures that fail the save are blinded until the end of their next turn.
notes: AoE: affects all creatures within 10 feet (range 1)
Blinded condition: disadvantage on attack rolls, advantage for attackers
